beer.beer_description:
Hailing from Wallonia, this beer style was traditionally brewed in the colder months, aged through spring, and ready to quench the thirst of farm workers in the fields. Saisons have roots back to the dawn of agriculture when workers needed a safe-to-drink beverage and lots of it!
BentSpoke’s take on this classic undergoes extended aging in a foeder and barrel. It's the perfect refreshment after a day on the slopes!

items.badge_description: You have a keen taste for this Belgian masterpiece. Did you know the Saison style beer was invented by Belgian farms, brewed in the Winter and served the Spring/Summer to all their workers? Well now you do! That’s 95 different Farmhouse Ales! Try 5 more for Level 20.

items.checkin_comment: Absolutely delicious. Really hits that mark of still being a beer with the extra funkiness of a saison. Mellow and easy to drink despite being full of booze. Also a bargain for $5

items.badge_description: While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 235 check-ins at venue that is verified. Try 5 more for Level 48!

items.badge_description: At a new place and don't want to choose a pint of something you may not like? Grab a few tasters! Enjoy some small pours and then decide which to upgrade to a full pour. That's 175 checkins with the serving style of Taster. Try 5 more for Level 36! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

items.checkin_comment: Very nice, I like! Yeasty, funky and farms.

items.badge_description: You’ve unlocked Deep Space Drams! Today’s featured style earns double points toward your faction. Your check-ins and toasts help decide which icon arrives in Untappd next year. Visit Recappd to explore your stats!

items.checkin_comment: Damn nice saison! Fuller and thinker than a standard frog one!

items.badge_description: It takes the perfect amount of light, the right framing and a touch of creative love to get the perfect picture of your brew. Now it’s time to drink it! That’s 30 check-ins with a photo.

Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 10 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 3!
